sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8934" key="a)nqupa/rxw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθυπ-άρχω</orth>, <sense id="n8934.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be set over against,</tr_> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀντίστοιχα,</foreign> Stoic. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.960b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
